name: Infinite Moving Cards
summary: An auto-scrolling horizontal card carousel that clones content for seamless infinite loop animation.
detailedDescription: Infinite Moving Cards creates a continuous horizontal scroll of testimonial cards using CSS custom properties and animation. The component clones each card item and appends to scroller, creating seamless loop effect. Direction prop controls animation-direction CSS variable ('forwards' for left, 'reverse' for right). Speed prop sets animation-duration (fast: 20s, normal: 40s, slow: 80s). Pause-on-hover stops animation via animation-play-state:paused. Container uses mask-image linear gradient (transparent → white 20% → white 80% → transparent) for fade edges. Cards have 350px width (450px md+), rounded-2xl corners, border with gradient background (light: #fafafa to #f5f5f5, dark: #27272a to #18181b). Content displays quote, name, and title in blockquote structure. The effect creates endless testimonial stream ideal for social proof sections, review showcases, or any context where continuous content flow demonstrates abundance and credibility.
behavior: Clones card items for seamless loop
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
